ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-13-2026 Granted Per Written Order

Off Calendar May-05-2026 Continued To May-13-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-14-2026 Continued To May-05-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Apr-14-2026 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-11-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Cazzie Brown, decedent's daughter (via Zoom) - observing only.

This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated January 5, 1996, is admitted to probate. Valerie Spizarsky is appointed as the Executor with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for April 14, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. If either petition is filed two weeks prior, no appearance is required on that date. Michael Kasolas is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
